title: Volunteer Development Executive
description:
Job Summary

The role of Volunteer Development Executive is to recruit, train, and mentor youth, equipping them with essential skills to plan and execute projects/activities for the community. This role involves guiding youths to discover their strengths, encouraging active participation, and ensuring a safe, supportive environment for growth. Through consistent engagement and reflection, your role is to help youth build confidence, empathy, and a commitment to service - empowering them to contribute meaningfully to society.


Job Specifications

● Build relationship and rapport with youth through programmes to

help gain traction for volunteering among the youth

● Work with SG Cares Volunteer Centre @ Jurong team and its partners

to identify volunteering needs of the town and identify potential

areas for community projects

● Develop youth through community projects by:

○ Facilitating group discussions to spark ideas and identify

meaningful project opportunities

○ Working with youth to define clear objectives and break down

larger goals into specific, achievable steps

○ Guiding the execution of projects while empowering youth to take

ownership and lead decision-making

○ Monitoring progress and stepping in when needed, while

maintaining a youth-led approach. Providing timely, constructive

feedback in a safe and supportive environment that nurtures

growth and confidence

● Document important data such as number of volunteers,

volunteering hours etc to help the team to review the effectiveness

of current practices in building a volunteering culture

● Maintain a database of volunteers to ensure proper recognition of

their contributions during our annual Volunteer Appreciation event

● Manage and maintain records of volunteer groups, partnerships and

build a repository of community resources within the town.


Core Competencies:

● Excellent stakeholder management skills and proactive in engaging

diverse stakeholders from the public and private sectors, volunteers

and residents

●Detail-oriented with excellent planning and coordination skills

● Strong written, communication, presentation and interpersonal skills

● Strong organisational and administrative skills

● Proficient in MS Office and Canva

● Proficient in managing data on Excel

postedCompany.description:
Tasek Academy and Social Services (the “Company”) is a non­profit organization incorporated on 14 December 2014. It is located at 1 Yung Sheng Road, #03­06 Jurong Town Community Club, Singapore 618495.

The mission of the Company is to support and help uplift the beneficiaries, the socially disadvantaged, who include, but are not limited to, ex­inmates, youth at risk, single parents, the needy and disabled and their families. Further, the Company has established the following objectives:­
(a) to develop innovative and/or customised solutions to support, uplift and assist its beneficiaries;
(b) to identify and create meaningful and fulfilling employment and other opportunities for our beneficiaries;
(c) to mentor and train our beneficiaries;
(d) the advancement of learning;
(e) the advancement of community development;
(f) the advancement of arts, heritage and culture;
(g) to provide grants, aid and/or assistance towards and/or in furtherance of any of the objects of the Company;
(h) to aid, assist and give relief in any manner and to any extent to any charitable institution whose object/s are similar to or comparable with the objects of the Company; and
(i) to carry out any other objects that are of a charitable, benevolent or philanthropic nature howsoever defined, as the Company may deem appropriate.
postedCompany.name: TASEK ACADEMY AND SOCIAL SERVICES LIMITED
